title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
summary: AI technology has been used to reconstruct cockpit recordings from spectrograms, prompting the NTSB to temporarily restrict access to its docket system. This raises concerns about potential misuse of aviation safety data and has forced regulatory action.
content: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

zh.title: AI被用于复原已故飞行员的声音
zh.summary: 人工智能技术已被用于从声谱图中重建座舱录音，促使美国国家运输安全委员会(NTSB)临时限制对其文件系统的访问。这引发了对航空安全数据潜在滥用的担忧，并促使了监管行动。

title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
summary: SpaceX successfully completed the first launch of its upgraded Starship V3 rocket, though the booster was lost during its return phase. The successful launch is crucial for SpaceX's ambitious goals for future missions.
content: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

zh.title: SpaceX首次发射星舰V3，但在返回时丢失了助推器
zh.summary: SpaceX成功完成了其升级版星舰V3火箭的首次发射，尽管助推器在返回阶段丢失。这次成功的发射对SpaceX未来任务的雄心勃勃的目标至关重要。

title: Four Russian satellites are now within striking distance of an ICEYE radarsat
summary: Four Russian satellites have maneuvered into close proximity to an ICEYE radar satellite, displaying a capability uncommon for routine satellite operations. The positioning raises concerns about potential antisatellite weapons development.
content: "This capability is not common for satellites conducting typical missions."

zh.title: 四颗俄罗斯卫星现已进入ICEYE雷达卫星的打击范围
zh.summary: 四颗俄罗斯卫星已机动到靠近ICEYE雷达卫星的位置，展现了在常规卫星操作中不常见的能力。这种定位引发了对潜在反卫星武器发展的担忧。

title: Ebola outbreak now third largest recorded and "spreading rapidly"
summary: An Ebola outbreak has escalated to become the third-largest on record, with deaths reaching 177 and nearly 750 confirmed cases as of the latest count. Health authorities have increased the risk level due to rapid spread.
content: Ebola outbreak risk level increased as deaths reach 177 with nearly 750 cases.

zh.title: 埃博拉疫情成为有记录以来第三大规模爆发并"迅速蔓延"
zh.summary: 埃博拉疫情已升级为有记录以来第三大规模爆发，截至最新统计，死亡人数达177人，确诊病例近750例。卫生当局因疫情迅速蔓延而提高了风险等级。

title: First-generation Chromecast users stressed by devices suddenly failing
summary: First-generation Chromecast devices experienced widespread failures that caused distress among users of the aging hardware. Google confirmed the issue and announced a fix for the affected devices.
content: Google tells Ars it fixed the first-gen Chromecast bug.

zh.title: 第一代Chromecast用户因设备突然故障而感到困扰
zh.summary: 第一代Chromecast设备经历了广泛的故障，给这款老旧硬件的用户造成了困扰。谷歌证实了该问题并宣布了针对受影响设备的修复方案。

title: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
summary: Blue Origin has received clearance to resume flights of its New Glenn mega-rocket following an April engine failure that resulted in the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite. The company provided limited details about the incident.
content: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

zh.title: 蓝色起源在四月事故后获准飞行新格伦超大火箭
zh.summary: 蓝色起源公司在四月发动机故障导致AST SpaceMobile卫星丧失后，获得了恢复其新格伦超大火箭飞行的批准。该公司对事件提供的细节有限。

title: Trump FCC asks public to comment on whether ABC's The View is a news show
summary: The Trump administration's FCC has invited public comments on whether ABC's "The View" should be classified as a news program, questioning whether editorial decisions are based on newsworthiness. The inquiry reflects broader political debates over media classification.
content: FCC seeks opinions on whether ABC show's decisions are "based on newsworthiness."

zh.title: 特朗普任期内FCC要求公众评论ABC的《观点》是否属于新闻节目
zh.summary: 特朗普政府的FCC邀请公众评论ABC的《观点》是否应被归类为新闻节目，质疑编辑决策是否基于新闻价值。该查询反映了更广泛的媒体分类政治辩论。

title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
summary: Google has introduced disco-ball themed icons that users can apply to their Pixel home screen for a glittery customization effect. The playful design option marks Google's lighthearted approach to device personalization.
content: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

zh.title: 谷歌推出迪斯科球图标带来闪闪发光效果："你们真的还想要这个吗？"
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了迪斯科球主题图标，用户可以将其应用于Pixel主屏幕以获得闪闪发光的定制效果。这个有趣的设计选项标志着谷歌对设备个性化的轻松态度。

title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
summary: Some AI startups are inflating annual recurring revenue (ARR) metrics in public announcements, with venture capitalists aware of the practice. The inflation of traditional revenue metrics has become a common strategy for presenting AI startup progress.
content: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

zh.title: 风投和创始人如何使用夸大的"ARR"来推崇AI初创公司
zh.summary: 一些AI初创公司在公开声明中夸大年度经常性收入(ARR)指标，风险投资家对这种做法心知肚明。传统收入指标的夸大已成为展示AI初创公司进展的常见策略。

title: US scrambles to stop Internet users re-creating dead pilots’ voices
summary: The US government is working to prevent the recreation of deceased pilots' voices following demonstrations of AI technology that can reconstruct cockpit audio from spectrograms. The effort attempts to enforce laws restricting disclosure of NTSB cockpit recordings.
content: Workaround flouts law that bans NTSB disclosures of cockpit audio recordings.

zh.title: 美国争相阻止互联网用户重现已故飞行员的声音
zh.summary: 美国政府正在采取措施防止已故飞行员声音的重现，这是在人工智能技术可以从频谱图重建驾驶舱音频的演示之后。该努力试图执行限制美国国家运输安全委员会驾驶舱录音披露的法律。

title: The Boys is dead. Long live Vought Rising.
summary: The superhero series "The Boys" is concluding after its final season, with a spin-off series called "Vought Rising" in development to continue the story. The spin-off promises new perspectives on the fictional universe's darker future.
content: "There's a brighter future. All we need to do is take it."

zh.title: 《黑袍纠察队》已死。沃特公司崛起万岁。
zh.summary: 超级英雄系列《黑袍纠察队》在最后一季后结束，名为《沃特公司崛起》的衍生剧已在开发中以继续故事。衍生剧承诺对虚构宇宙更黑暗的未来提供新的视角。

title: Police boast of hacking VPN where criminals "believed themselves to be safe"
summary: Law enforcement successfully intercepted VPN traffic, seized associated domains, and arrested the VPN operator who believed the service provided secure anonymity to criminals. The operation demonstrates vulnerability in criminal infrastructure despite illusions of security.
content: Law enforcement intercepted VPN traffic, seized domains, and arrested its operator.

zh.title: 警察吹嘘入侵VPN，罪犯"认为自己是安全的"
zh.summary: 执法部门成功拦截VPN流量、查封相关域名并逮捕了相信该服务为罪犯提供安全匿名的VPN运营商。该行动表明尽管看似安全，但犯罪基础设施仍存在漏洞。

title: Review: The Mandalorian and Grogu is ... fine
summary: The review of "The Mandalorian and Grogu" acknowledges the film's predictable plot and mediocre action sequences, but praises the charm and appeal of the Grogu character. Overall reception is lukewarm despite the show's entertainment value.
content: The plot is predictable, the fight scenes are meh, but you can't beat the charm of that little green Grogu.

zh.title: 评测：曼达洛人和格罗古... 还不错
zh.summary: 关于《曼达洛人和格罗古》的评论承认该电影情节可预测、动作场景平庸，但赞扬了格罗古角色的魅力和吸引力。尽管该剧具有娱乐价值，但整体评价仍不温不火。

title: Texas AG sues Meta over claims that WhatsApp doesn't provide end-to-end encryption
summary: The Texas Attorney General filed a lawsuit against Meta, alleging that WhatsApp fails to provide end-to-end encryption to its users despite claims. Critics have questioned the lawsuit's factual basis, and the AG is also running for US Senate.
content: Critics note a lack of factual support in lawsuit filed by US Senate candidate.

zh.title: 德州司法部长起诉Meta，指控WhatsApp未提供端到端加密
zh.summary: 德州司法部长对Meta提起诉讼，指控WhatsApp尽管声称但未能向用户提供端到端加密。批评人士质疑该诉讼的事实依据，该司法部长也在竞选美国参议院席位。

title: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is on sale for $49.99 (marked down $10), one of its best prices yet. The device lets travelers use their own wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems instead of airline-provided earbuds. It also works with Nintendo Switch, car stereos, and gym equipment, extending utility beyond air travel.
content:
Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 let you connect wireless headphones to in-flight entertainment systems as well as the Nintendo Switch. | Image: Twelve South	

With Memorial day weekend kicking off the travel season, we’re seeing a lot of deals pop up on travel gadgets, from portable power banks to noise-canceling headphones. One of the best right now is Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter, which lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems so you can enjoy your flight a little more. It’s currently down to $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon and directly from Twelve South, which is one of its best prices to date.
Twelve South AirFly Pro 2

Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $49.99 at Amazon
 $59.99 $49.99 at Twelve South

The Bluetooth transmitter lets you ditch the airline’s wired earbuds in favor of your own Bluetooth headphones or earbuds, which makes for a much better in-flight listening experience. All you need to do is plug the AirFly Pro 2 into the headphone jack on a seatback entertainment system, pair your headphones, and you’re set. It also supports two pairs of headphones at once, so you can watch movies or listen to podcasts with a travel companion. 
As Twelve South’s premium AirFly model, the Pro 2 also adds a few welcome improvements that make it even easier to use. That includes the cheaper AirFly SE’s dedicated onboard volume controls as well as an upgraded processor, which enables faster pairing and improved sound quality with less background noise. Its battery should also last up to 25 hours on a single charge, which should comfortably last you through even the longest flights.
The AirFly Pro 2 remains useful long after you land, too. As it works with any standard audio jack, you can also use it to connect your wireless headphones to devices like a Nintendo Switch , older car stereos, and even compatible gym equipment like treadmills.

zh.title: Twelve South AirFly Pro 2在夏季旅行前迎来最低价格之一
zh.summary: Twelve South AirFly Pro 2蓝牙适配器现已降价至49.99美元（原价下降10美元），创下历史最低价。该设备可让旅客在飞行中使用自己的无线耳机而非航空公司提供的耳塞。它还支持Nintendo Switch、汽车音响和健身房设备，应用范围超越航空旅行。

title: Before it comes down, what should be saved from the International Space Station?
summary: As the International Space Station approaches its eventual decommissioning, questions arise about which materials and equipment should be preserved for museums and historical records. Not all items that went to space can or should be returned to Earth.
content: What went up cannot all come down (for museum display).

zh.title: 国际空间站即将坠落，应该保存其中哪些物品？
zh.summary: 随着国际空间站逐步停用，出现了关于哪些材料和设备应该保存到博物馆和历史记录中的问题。进入太空的并非所有物品都可以或应该返回地球。

title: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta has launched a new Forum app that combines Facebook Groups with dedicated features and an integrated AI chatbot for discovering and discussing advice. Users can view, post, and search within their groups with optional AI assistance, positioning Meta as an alternative to Reddit and Google's AI-powered search results. The app automatically syncs groups from users' existing Facebook accounts.
content:
Meta's new Forum app for iPhones takes Facebook Groups and moves them to a dedicated app with a dedicated AI chatbot to go with it, like an AI revamp of the ill-fated Groups app Facebook shut down in 2017. 
Rather than going to ChatGPT or tacking "Reddit" onto the end of a Google search, Forum users can view, search for, and post advice directly in their Facebook groups, with optional help from Meta's AI. 
After logging in with my Facebook account, Forum automatically pulled in the groups I was part of on Facebook and populated my feed with posts from those groups, along with suggestions from groups I'm not part of, similar to my Reddit fe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta的Forum应用融合了Reddit、Facebook和谷歌AI概览的特点
zh.summary: Meta推出了一款新的Forum应用，整合了Facebook群组功能、专属特性和集成AI聊天机器人，用于发现和讨论建议。用户可以在群组内浏览、发布和搜索内容，并可选择使用AI助手，使Meta成为Reddit和谷歌AI搜索的替代方案。该应用会自动同步用户现有Facebook账户中的群组。

title: Soaring solar and a surge in hydro push more coal off the US grid
summary: Renewable energy sources—particularly solar and hydroelectric power—are increasingly displacing coal from the US electrical grid according to early 2026 data. This trend reverses an anomaly from the previous year and reflects both environmental progress and shifts in energy market dynamics. The displacement signals accelerating adoption of cleaner energy sources.
content: The first data from 2026 seem to indicate that last year was an oddity.

zh.title: 太阳能和水电的激增将煤炭从美国电网中挤出
zh.summary: 根据2026年初数据，可再生能源，尤其是太阳能和水力发电，正在逐步取代美国电网中的煤炭。这一趋势扭转了去年的异常现象，既反映了环保进步，也反映了能源市场动态的变化。这种替代趋势表明清洁能源采纳速度在加快。

title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
summary: Grok, Elon Musk's AI chatbot developed by xAI, has minimal adoption and barely appears in US government AI usage records despite Musk's ambitions for a major IPO. A Reuters analysis of 400+ government AI uses found Grok in only three instances, all for basic tasks like document drafting. The low uptake raises serious questions about the chatbot's viability.
content:
There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok barely appears in federal records of how the US government used AI last year. It's not the only sign xAI's signature chatbot is in trouble, even as Musk puts it at the heart of what could be the biggest IPO in history.
Reuters reviewed more than 400 examples of government AI use where specific vendors were named. Grok or xAI, it found, appeared in only three - each of those for basic uses like document drafting or social media management, and always …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆，停止让Grok流行的尝试
zh.summary: Grok是埃隆·马斯克旗下xAI公司开发的AI聊天机器人，采用率极低，在美国政府AI使用记录中几乎没有出现，尽管马斯克对大型IPO野心勃勃。路透社对400多个政府AI用途的分析发现Grok仅在三个实例中出现，都是用于文档起草等基本任务。这种低采用率引发了对该聊天机器人可行性的严重质疑。

title: Trump abruptly cancels EO signing event after top AI firm CEOs declined to go
summary: Trump canceled a planned executive order signing event after top AI firm CEOs declined to attend, citing concerns over innovation restrictions. The president argued the AI safety testing order would stifle innovation and serve as an 'innovation blocker.' The decision reflects tension between tech industry demands for regulatory flexibility and calls for stronger AI safety safeguards.
content: Trump delays AI safety testing EO, claiming it would be an innovation “blocker.”

zh.title: 在顶级AI公司首席执行官拒绝参加后，特朗普突然取消行政令签署活动
zh.summary: 在顶级AI公司首席执行官以创新限制为由拒绝参加后，特朗普取消了计划的行政令签署活动。总统辩称AI安全测试令会抑制创新，成为"创新阻力"。这一决定反映了科技行业对监管灵活性的需求与加强AI安全保护呼声之间的紧张关系。

title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Major retailers are running aggressive Memorial Day sales (through May 25th) across electronics, home goods, and outdoor equipment with significant discounts. Featured deals include AirPods Pro 3 at $199.99, premium noise-canceling earbuds, smart home devices, and 4K TVs at historically low prices. The sales kick off the summer shopping season.
content:
Memorial Day is nearly here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your weekend plans involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals on everything from 4K OLED TVs and noise-canceling earbuds to tents, robot vacuums, and plenty of our favorite everyday essentials.
To give you more options, we’ve also included a selection of deals from retailers that aren’t necessarily running their own Memorial Day sales but are still offering limited-time deals in the run-up to May 25th.
Savings are savings, after all.







Earbuds and headphones 
AirPods Pro 3
The AirPods Pro 3 have a new design that improves their fit, superior noise cancellation, better bass, and fairly accurate heart rate sensors. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249 $199.99 at Amazon
 $249 $199.99 at Walmart
 $249.99 $199.99 at Best Buy


Nothing Headphone A
Nothing’s second over-ear headphones may not offer everything found on the pricier Nothing Headphone 1, but you do get physical controls, good sound, and more than five days of battery life per charge. Their design is also a bit more discreet, for better or worse. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $199 $169 at Amazon
 $199 $169 at Nothing


Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds (2nd Gen)
The second-gen QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds have dynamic, rich sound and the best noise cancellation currently available in a pair of true wireless earbuds. They’re a terrific pick if you want to listen to your music in peace. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $299 $249 at Amazon
 $299 $249 at Walmart
 $299 $249 at Best Buy

Samsung’s Galaxy Buds 3 Pro are on sale for $149.99 ($100 off) at Best Buy, which matches their all-time low price. The wireless earbuds are our top pick for Samsung Galaxy phone device owners, thanks to their comfortable AirPods-inspired design, terrific sound quality, and good noise cancellation. They also

zh.title: 本周末可购物的最佳阵亡将士纪念日销售
zh.summary: 主要零售商在电子产品、家居用品和户外设备上举办力度大的阵亡将士纪念日销售（至5月25日），提供大幅折扣。精选优惠包括AirPods Pro 3以199.99美元的价格、高级降噪耳塞、智能家居设备和4K电视，价格处于历史低位。销售活动拉开了夏季购物季的序幕。

title: Govee’s colorful, JBL-tuned Lamp Pro 2 is matching its best price to date
summary: Govee's Table Lamp 2 Pro X, a hybrid smart lamp and JBL Bluetooth speaker, has matched its all-time low price of $134.99 (down $45). The device features 210 individually-controllable RGB LEDs with 100 lighting presets, JBL audio, and 4.5 hours of battery life per charge. Its smart home compatibility makes it versatile for entertainment and ambiance creation.
content:
They say that Memorial Day marks the unofficial start of summer. I have my doubts given the less-than-balmy weather in many parts of the US this weekend, though that doesn’t mean it’s not an appropriate time to pick up some summer essentials — including a portable speaker / smart lamp like Govee’s Table Lamp 2 Pro. Right now, it’s matching its all-time low of $134.99 ($45 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Govee’s online storefront ahead of the holiday on May 25th.
Govee Table Lamp 2 Pro X Sound by JBL

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $134.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 $134.99 at Best Buy
 $179.99 $134.99 at Govee

Govee currently has several color-changing table lamps in its stable, with the Lamp 2 Pro being the most capable of the bunch. It essentially combines a color-changing smart lamp with a capable JBL Bluetooth speaker, resulting in a device that can blanket your home with glitzy RGB lighting effects while playing your favorite T-Swift or Bad Bunny cuts (or whatever the kids are into these days). It’s not waterproof, sadly, but it is relatively portable at just 5 pounds; it also features a 5,200mAh battery, which delivers around 4.5 hours of runtime per charge.
For its 360-degree lighting array, the Lamp 2 Pro uses 210 LED beads, each individually controllable and capable of displaying both color and up to 600 lumens of tunable white light. There are a staggering 100 presents to choose from — all of which are strikingly vivid, 16 of which sync with music — and you can quickly swap between them using the Govee app over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth (it also works with Amazon Alexa and Google Home). The Matter-equipped lamp also offers a slew of ambient sounds, from chirping birds and waves to a crackling fireplace, just in case you’d rather wind down than rave at the end of the night.
As for the integrated JBL speaker, it’s good enough. It produces clear highs and decent mids, making it well-suited for listening to the radio or your favorite podcast. The bass response is pretty limited, tho

zh.title: Govee 彩色 JBL 调音台灯 Pro 2 创造历史新低价
zh.summary: Govee Table Lamp 2 Pro X（混合智能灯和 JBL 蓝牙扬声器）创造了历史新低价 $134.99（降低 $45）。该设备具有 210 个可单独控制的 RGB LED、100 个照明预设、JBL 音频和 4.5 小时的电池续航时间。其智能家居兼容性使其在娱乐和营造氛围方面用途广泛。

title: Google appeals search monopoly ruling, says it won business ‘fair and square’
summary: Google filed an appeal of the federal monopoly ruling, arguing the decision violated legal guardrails and asserting the company 'won the marketplace fair and square.' The appeal challenges both the August 2024 monopolization finding and September 2025 remedies orders requiring Google to share search data with competitors. The outcome will significantly impact Google's business practices and competitive positioning.
content:
Google officially filed its appeal of the federal ruling deeming it an illegal search monopolist, arguing the decision "crashed" through legal guardrails. "Google just prevailed in the marketplace fair and square," it writes in its legal filing.
Google had already said it would appeal the ruling, which includes both the August 2024 decision about its illegal monopolization and the September 2025 remedies decision that ordered it to share some search data with competitors. The appeal brief filed Friday gives more insight into how the company plans to fight Judge Amit Mehta's ruling.
"We are asking the court to overturn this flawed decision  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌对搜索垄断裁决提起上诉，称公司"公平竞争"赢得业务
zh.summary: 谷歌对联邦垄断裁决提起上诉，辩称该决定违反了法律保障，并主张公司"公平竞争赢得市场"。该上诉质疑 2024 年 8 月的垄断认定和 2025 年 9 月的补救令，后者要求谷歌与竞争对手共享搜索数据。该结果将大大影响谷歌的商业实践和竞争地位。

title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
summary: The website for Kash Patel's clothing brand was compromised by hackers who distributed malware to trick visitors into installing harmful software. The incident highlights critical security vulnerabilities in e-commerce platforms. The site was taken offline following reports of the compromise on social media.
content: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.

zh.title: 卡什·帕特尔服装品牌网站在被黑客入侵报道后关闭
zh.summary: 卡什·帕特尔的服装品牌网站被黑客入侵，他们分发恶意软件来欺骗访问者安装有害软件。该事件突出了电子商务平台中的严重安全漏洞。在社交媒体上报道该入侵后，该网站被下线。

title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
summary: Apple is petitioning the Supreme Court to narrow Epic Games' App Store injunction victory and overturn a contempt ruling related to external payment options. The company argues the broader remedies shouldn't apply to all developers and seeks to limit the precedent set by the case. The dispute continues fundamental disagreements over App Store control and developer payment flexibility.
content: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

zh.title: 苹果称Epic诉讼不应改变App Store对所有开发者的规则
zh.summary: 苹果正在向最高法院请愿，以缩小Epic游戏在App Store禁令案中的胜利范围，并推翻藐视法庭的裁决。该公司辩称，更广泛的补救措施不应适用于所有开发者，并寻求限制该案设立的先例。这场纠纷继续围绕App Store的控制权和开发者支付灵活性的根本分歧。

title: The Steam Controller’s “drop-in” charger almost started a fire for this owner
summary: The Steam Controller's magnetic 'drop-in' charger poses a significant fire hazard due to exposed metal pins that can cause dangerous electrical shorts. One user's charging experience nearly resulted in a fire, exposing a critical design flaw affecting all Steam Controller users. The issue highlights the risks of charging dock design without adequate safety considerations.
content: Keep the charging puck’s exposed pins far away from anything metal.

zh.title: Steam Controller的即插即充充电器几乎引发火灾
zh.summary: Steam Controller的磁性即插即充充电器由于暴露的金属触点可能导致危险的电气短路，存在重大火灾隐患。一位用户的充电经历几乎导致火灾，暴露了影响所有Steam Controller用户的严重设计缺陷。这个问题凸显了在没有足够安全考虑的情况下充电底座设计带来的风险。

title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
summary: Spotify has deployed multiple AI-powered tools designed to encourage users to generate more content on the platform. While intended to boost engagement and creation, some users find the tools excessive and misaligned with their content preferences. The rollout reflects Spotify's broader AI-first content strategy.
content: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

zh.title: Spotify的AI赌注：更多内容，更少你想要的
zh.summary: Spotify部署了多个AI驱动的工具，旨在鼓励用户在平台上生成更多内容。虽然目的是提高用户参与度和创意生成，但一些用户发现这些工具过度且与他们的内容偏好不一致。这次推出反映了Spotify更广泛的AI优先内容战略。

title: Waymo suspends freeway driving amid safety concerns
summary: Waymo has suspended freeway driving across all US markets due to safety concerns in construction zones, with additional pauses in Atlanta and San Antonio for flooded road hazards. The decision followed incidents where Waymo robotaxis were spotted navigating flooded areas at high speeds in Texas. The suspension prioritizes passenger safety while the company addresses autonomous driving challenges.
content:
On Thursday, Waymo customers opened up the app and noticed something unusual: no more freeway service. Trips that would normally take a few minutes on the freeway were suddenly projected to last much longer via local roads. 
The company later confirmed that it had suspended freeway driving across all of its US markets over concerns about construction zones. It had also paused service in Atlanta and San Antonio over lingering issues regarding flooded roads. The news comes after several of the company's robotaxis were spotted driving through flooded roads at elevated speeds in Texas, forcing Waymo to issue a software recall for its entire fle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waymo 因安全隐患暂停高速公路驾驶
zh.summary: 由于施工区安全隐患，Waymo 已在所有美国市场暂停高速公路驾驶，亚特兰大和圣安东尼奥因积水道路危害暂停服务。此决定源于 Waymo 无人出租车在德克萨斯州高速通过积水区域的事件。暂停措施优先考虑乘客安全，同时公司应对自动驾驶挑战。

title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
summary: Google's AI Overviews feature breaks when users search for the word 'disregard,' displaying generic chatbot responses instead of search result summaries. The malfunction prevents meaningful search results for that specific term, effectively making the query unsearchable. The bug demonstrates vulnerabilities in Google's AI-powered search interface.
content: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

zh.title: 您再也无法在谷歌搜索'disregard'这个词
zh.summary: 谷歌 AI Overviews 功能在用户搜索'disregard'一词时出错，显示通用聊天机器人回复而非搜索结果摘要。该故障阻止了该特定词汇的有意义搜索结果，实际上使查询无法搜索。该漏洞暴露了谷歌 AI 驱动搜索界面的漏洞。

title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
summary: Multiple searches for 'disregard' on Google's AI Overviews return unhelpful chatbot-style responses instead of search result summaries, treating the query as conversational input rather than an information request. The glitch leaves users unable to find relevant search results for that specific term. The issue raises concerns about the reliability of Google's new AI search implementation.
content:
Google's AI Overviews are running into an interesting problem right now. As of this writing, if you search for the term "disregard," instead of showing the usual AI-generated summary of search results, the AI Overview section instead includes a response like what you'd see from a more traditional AI chatbot, as called out by a post on X.
To one Verge colleague searching "disregard":
Got it! Let me know if you need help with anything else.
Nothing else followed in the AI Overview portion of the results page.
To me, initially:
No problem at all! How can I help you today?
I searched for "disregard" again later and got another response …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌的 AI 搜索故障严重，可以'忽视'您的搜索内容
zh.summary: 在谷歌 AI Overviews 上多次搜索'disregard'返回无用的聊天机器人式回复而非搜索结果摘要，将查询视为对话输入而非信息请求。该故障使用户无法找到该特定词汇的相关搜索结果。该问题引发了对谷歌新 AI 搜索实现可靠性的关注。

title: First vaccines, now mammograms? RFK Jr.’s latest firings have doctors outraged.
summary: RFK Jr. is firing preventive care personnel, including those involved in vaccines and mammograms, alarming doctors about public health impacts. The dismissals signal a potential shift away from preventive medicine initiatives. This raises significant concerns about fundamental healthcare policy changes affecting millions of Americans.
content: Doctors are angry and alarmed that preventive care could go the way of vaccines.

zh.title: 先是疫苗，现在是乳腺癌筛查？肯尼迪最新的人事变动引起医生愤怒
zh.summary: 肯尼迪正在解雇预防性护理人员，包括那些参与疫苗和乳腺癌筛查工作的人员，医生对公共卫生影响感到担忧。这些解雇表明可能会远离预防性医学倡议。这引发了对影响数百万美国人的根本性医疗政策变化的重大关注。

title: Rocket Report: Starship launch delayed, German launch company may aid Canada
summary: SpaceX's Starship launch is experiencing delays as attention focuses on South Texas for the latest test flight. A German launch company may provide support to Canadian space operations. These developments highlight ongoing progress in commercial spaceflight capabilities.
content: All eyes on South Texas for the latest Starship test flight.

zh.title: 火箭报告：星舰发射延迟，德国公司可能帮助加拿大
zh.summary: SpaceX星舰发射遭遇延迟，关注点集中在南德州进行最新测试飞行。德国航天公司可能为加拿大太空运营提供支持。这些进展突显了商业航天能力的持续进步。

title: Samsung’s memory chip employees negotiated $340,000 bonuses this year
summary: Samsung semiconductor employees secured an average $340,000 annual bonus after threatening to strike over bonus caps. Under the deal, all chip workers will receive 50 percent of their annual salary as bonuses in cash. The agreement follows similar gains by workers at rival SK Hynix amid surging demand for AI components.
content:
48,000 Samsung workers had threatened to strike unless bonus caps were lifted. | Photo: Jung Yeon-je / AFP via Getty Images	

Details have emerged about a tentative deal struck between Samsung and semiconductor employees who had threatened to strike. The deal reportedly makes some workers eligible for average annual bonuses of $340,000.
The proposed 18-day strike had hinged on Samsung's bonus cap for employees in the semiconductor division and followed a substantial rise in the possible bonuses available to employees of SK Hynix, another South Korean chipmaker enjoying a boom thanks to demand for AI components.
Under the terms of the new deal, Reuters reports that all ​chip workers will receive 50 percent of their annual salary as a regular bonus in cash. Further …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星存储芯片员工今年协商获得34万美元奖金
zh.summary: 三星半导体员工在威胁因奖金上限罢工后，成功获得平均34万美元的年度奖金。根据该协议，所有芯片员工将获得年薪的50%作为现金奖金。该协议紧随竞争对手SK海力士员工获得的类似收益，当前AI芯片需求激增。

title: The $58,000 TV bill: When DirecTV sued O.J. Simpson for piracy
summary: DirecTV sued O.J. Simpson in 2001 over a $58,000 TV bill after the FBI discovered illegal smartcards and bootloaders at his home. The case exemplifies the entertainment industry's efforts to enforce digital rights and combat piracy. The settlement amount underscores the significant value the industry placed on preventing unauthorized access.
content: In 2001, the FBI raided O.J.'s house and found smartcards, bootloaders.

zh.title: 5.8万美元的电视账单：DirecTV诉O.J.辛普森盗版案
zh.summary: 2001年，DirecTV因O.J.辛普森5.8万美元的电视账单起诉他，联邦调查局在其住宅发现非法智能卡和引导程序。该案反映了娱乐业在执行数字权利和打击盗版方面的努力。和解金额显示该行业对防止未经授权访问的重视程度。

title: Microsoft’s consumer marketing chief to leave next year
summary: Yusuf Mehdi, Microsoft's executive vice president and consumer chief marketing officer, is departing after 35 years at the company. Mehdi will remain focused on Windows, Copilot, and Microsoft 365 consumer business through 2027. The leadership transition occurs as Microsoft navigates a critical period of AI-driven consumer strategy development.
content:
Yusuf Mehdi launching Copilot Plus PCs in 2024. | Image: Getty	

Yusuf Mehdi, executive vice president and consumer chief marketing officer at Microsoft, is leaving the company after 35 years. Mehdi announced his departure in an internal memo on Thursday, noting that he will leave Microsoft next year. He will remain focused on marketing for Windows, Copilot for consumers and the Microsoft 365 consumer business until 2027.
"As I thought about this decision, one thing was crystal clear: I want to ensure I have the time and space to set the team - and our mission - up for continued success," says Mehdi in his memo. "We are in the middle of an incredibly important moment for Microsoft and for our customers."
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软消费营销主管明年离职
zh.summary: 微软执行副总裁兼消费部首席营销官尤素福·梅迪在公司工作35年后即将离职。梅迪将在2027年之前继续关注Windows、Copilot和Microsoft 365消费业务。这一领导层变动发生在微软应对AI驱动型消费战略发展的关键时期。

title: A hacker group is poisoning open source code at an unprecedented scale
summary: TeamPCP, a hacker group, is conducting software supply chain attacks at unprecedented scale, with GitHub as their latest target. The gang has compromised open source code repositories affecting countless projects relying on these dependencies. This represents a critical cybersecurity threat to the foundation of modern software development.
content: GitHub is just the latest victim of TeamPCP, a gang that has carried out a spree of software supply chain attacks.

zh.title: 黑客组织以前所未有的规模投毒开源代码
zh.summary: 黑客组织TeamPCP以GitHub为目标进行大规模软件供应链攻击。该组织已破坏了开源代码存储库，影响了无数依赖这些库的项目。这对现代软件开发的基础构成了严重的网络安全威胁。

title: Microsoft is letting Office users remove an annoying Copilot button
summary: Microsoft is enabling Office users to disable the floating Copilot button that appears in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint following widespread complaints. The button had obstructed cells and documents while remaining difficult to fully disable. The update reflects Microsoft's acknowledgment that users need greater control over AI feature integration.
content:
Microsoft is rolling out Office app updates next week that allow users to disable a floating Copilot button. The button appeared in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint in recent weeks, and floats above the bottom right-hand section of spreadsheets or documents. It has angered many Excel users in particular, because it obstructs cells and you can't fully disable it.
"While we are seeing increased engagement with Copilot in Office apps with this update, we are also hearing the need for more control over how Copilot appears," admits Katie Kivett, partner group product manager at Microsoft. "While one of our goals is to evolve Copilot to be more adapti …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软允许Office用户移除烦人的Copilot按钮
zh.summary: 微软正在让Office用户禁用在Word、Excel和PowerPoint中显示的浮动Copilot按钮，该按钮曾引发广泛投诉。该按钮遮挡了单元格和文档，且难以完全禁用。此更新反映了微软对用户需要更好地控制AI功能集成的认可。

title: Finnish phone-maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
summary: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot, which supports 22 Indic languages, onto new smartphones to expand into the Indian market. The localization strategy helps the Finnish phone-maker compete in a key emerging market by offering language support tailored to local users.
content: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot app, which supports 22 Indic languages

zh.title: 芬兰手机制造商HMD在新智能手机上预装印度AI聊天机器人以拓展本地市场
zh.summary: HMD正在新智能手机上预装Sarvam公司的Indus聊天机器人，该机器人支持22种印度语言，以扩展印度市场。本地化策略通过提供针对本地用户的语言支持，帮助芬兰手机制造商在这个关键新兴市场竞争。

title: Ground system issue scrubs first launch of SpaceX's Starship V3 rocket
summary: SpaceX's first Starship V3 launch was postponed due to a ground system issue, with engineers targeting another attempt as soon as Friday evening. The delay highlights the technical challenges of developing the company's next-generation heavy-lift launch vehicle.
content: Engineers could make another attempt to launch Starship as soon as Friday evening.

zh.title: 地面系统问题导致SpaceX星舰V3火箭首次发射被取消
zh.summary: SpaceX星舰V3首次发射因地面系统问题被延期，工程师们计划最早在周五晚上进行下一次尝试。延期突出了开发该公司下一代重型运载火箭所面临的技术挑战。

title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
summary: Waymo has expanded its robotaxi service suspension to Atlanta and San Antonio after vehicles drove into flooded roads. The operational halt highlights ongoing safety challenges in adverse weather conditions. The company is working to prevent autonomous vehicles from navigating dangerous road conditions.
content: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

zh.title: Waymo扩大暂停范围至四个城市，机器人出租车仍驶入洪水
zh.summary: Waymo在车辆驶入洪水道路后，将其机器人出租车服务暂停扩大到亚特兰大和圣安东尼奥。这次运营中断突显了恶劣天气条件下持续存在的安全挑战。该公司正在努力防止自动驾驶车辆在危险道路条件下行驶。

title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
summary: SpaceX aborted its first Starship V3 launch moments before liftoff after fueling was complete. The company plans to reattempt the launch on Friday. The scrub reflects final safety checks or technical issues identified during final countdown procedures.
content: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.

zh.title: SpaceX在起飞前取消首次星舰V3发射
zh.summary: SpaceX在加注完成后于起飞前片刻中止了首次星舰V3的发射。该公司计划在周五重新尝试发射。这次取消反映了在最终倒数计时程序中发现的最终安全检查或技术问题。
